authoritative_requirement: Do not turn every difficult capability into a skill; deterministic modules, typed programs, references, human authority, and independent evaluators must be considered first.
synthetic_mode_satisfaction: Evaluate the governed alternative order and select deterministic Builder code for all five capabilities; new-skill authorization remains false.

authoritative_requirement: Run a formal skill necessity and capability-gap test before creating a JIT Skill.
synthetic_mode_satisfaction: Evaluate exact target-failure evidence, existing ownership, and all governed alternatives against the active zero-skill snapshot; emit one attributable decision.
test_seam: necessity evidence; capability coverage; decision receipt tests

authoritative_requirement: Prefer exact canonical reuse, Harness-local adaptation, or bounded adapter composition before authorizing a new canonical capability.
synthetic_mode_satisfaction: Record every alternative as considered and select existing deterministic code ownership; no adaptation, adapter, or new canonical capability is created.
test_seam: ordered alternatives; adequacy; no duplicate or mutation tests

authoritative_requirement: Every new or materially adapted skill begins from a typed reviewable Skill Design Brief.
synthetic_mode_satisfaction: Enforce the typed brief requirement for any gap decision while recording NOT_APPLICABLE_NO_GAP for this no-skill outcome; no brief instance is fabricated.
